ops.text: Card §8 enabling change LANDED in production code (cc-steer workspace cc-steer-wc on main 81b123bb, awaiting ship): paired DeLong is now the production default for comparative checkpoint verdicts. Watcher promotion persists BOTH arms' per-row probs + DeLong record (delta/95% CI/measured rho/paired MDE/card verdict) to <run>/paired_comparison.json on every incumbent-relative gate (reject included), and watcher_promotable applies the card decision rule (actionable iff CI excludes 0 AND |delta| >= 2.8016*SE_delta_paired; sub-threshold reported "within noise floor (MDE <value>)", never win/loss/rejection). Sweep score reports now carry per-row probs + frame digest; sweep.compare_score_reports / `cc-steer compare-arms` verdict any two arms paired, with the card sidecar's unpaired frame MDE as the counterpart-absent fallback (instrument.INSTRUMENT_CARD reads instrument-card-v1.json keys mde/stopping/mde_paired). Golden gates: E27 and E28 per-row extracts are now repo test fixtures (tests/fixtures/delong_e27.npz + delong_e28.npz) reproducing E27 se_delta 0.006007971219875388 / rho 0.8646998992070197 and E28 delta -0.012765523916255184 / rho 0.6984478492100372 / "within noise floor". The "production sweep/promotion persists only one probs vector" clause in gap #4 and mde_paired.requires is now stale once shipped. Task 1367beec criteria all met.
